turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 87-1022, New York Board of Estimate versus Morris and a related case will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: The judgments of the Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit in these two cases are affirmed. An opinion to that effect is on file with the Clerk. Justice Brennan, joined by Justice Stevens, has filed a separate concurring opinion; Justice Blackmun has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment.
